purpose: Storage path configuration for ai-novella-engine-v2. Canon files stay in the repository. Runtime state, sessions, logs and backups must live on Railway Volume when deployed.
initialization_rules: At runtime, resolve RUNTIME_DATA_ROOT using NOVELLA_RUNTIME_DATA_ROOT first, then RAILWAY_VOLUME_MOUNT_PATH, then ./runtime_data for local development.
Copy missing state template files from ./data/state into runtime state root on first start only.
Never overwrite runtime state files with repository templates after they already exist.
Never write active session state back into ./data/state in production.
Canon, rules, characters and scenes are read from repository files; runtime state is read/written from runtime_root.
